# cloudflare_flagship_app (Data Source)

Accepted Permissions

- `Flagship Read`

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_flagship_app" "example_flagship_app" {
  account_id = "account_id"
  app_id = "app_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) Cloudflare account ID.
- `app_id` (String) App identifier.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) App identifier.
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String) Email of the actor who last modified the app, or `edge-gateway` for gateway-authenticated changes.
